/usr/bin/ar qc libtb_core.a CMakeFiles/tb_core.dir/src/core/Grid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tb_core.dir/src/core/Battle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tb_core.dir/src/core/AI.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tb_core.dir/src/core/Spells.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tb_core.dir/src/core/Creatures.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tb_core.dir/src/core/Match.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tb_core.dir/src/core/Build.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tb_core.dir/src/data/BuildRepository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tb_core.dir/src/data/Json.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tb_core.dir/src/data/SpellJson.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tb_core.dir/src/data/CatalogJson.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tb_core.dir/src/data/CreatureJson.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tb_core.dir/src/data/RulesetJson.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tb_core.dir/src/data/MapJson.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tb_core.dir/src/data/Net.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tb_core.dir/src/data/Sha256.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libtb_core.a
